positive_cases: tenant with activated Phase 6A/6B/6C capability can access wired API surface through Foundry activation and Gatekeeper allow path
authorized high-risk action emits audit/evidence record
cross-tenant scheduling or workspace action preserves organization scoping
negative_cases: A request or UI flow from tenant A attempting to access tenant B 6A-6C data is denied and cannot return tenant B data.
A communication send attempt to a participant with an active opt-out is blocked before provider/send execution.
A tenant without Foundry activation for a 6A-6C service receives a server-side 404 or approved unavailable response when directly requesting that inactive service route.
A participant failing the required KYC or verification threshold remains at T1 or the applicable restricted tier and cannot access higher-trust actions.
A failed payment produces the approved correctable invoice or billing remediation path instead of silently succeeding, double-charging, or blocking without recovery.
evidence_required: request/response transcripts or automated demo assertions
inactive service route 404 or approved unavailable response proof
failed KYC or verification-tier restriction proof
failed payment correctable invoice or billing remediation proof

negative_assertions.name: cross_tenant_deny
negative_assertions.assertion: A request or UI flow from tenant A attempting to access tenant B 6A-6C data is denied and cannot return tenant B data.
negative_assertions.expected_result: Access denied or not found without cross-tenant data leakage; tenant-isolation evidence captured where required.
required_evidence: tenant isolation evidence or audit reference

negative_assertions.name: opt_out_send_blocked
negative_assertions.assertion: A communication send attempt to a participant with an active opt-out is blocked before provider/send execution.
negative_assertions.expected_result: Gatekeeper or communication-gateway enforcement blocks the send and emits/records the required evidence.

negative_assertions.name: inactive_service_route_404
negative_assertions.assertion: A tenant without Foundry activation for a 6A-6C service receives a server-side 404 or approved unavailable response when directly requesting that inactive service route.
negative_assertions.expected_result: Inactive service is unavailable server-side and business logic does not execute.

negative_assertions.name: failed_kyc_t1_restricted_path
negative_assertions.assertion: A participant failing the required KYC or verification threshold remains at T1 or the applicable restricted tier and cannot access higher-trust actions.
negative_assertions.expected_result: Tier/verification gate blocks higher-trust action and records the restriction basis without inventing new KYC policy.
required_evidence: Gatekeeper decision where high-risk action is attempted

negative_assertions.name: failed_payment_correctable_invoice
negative_assertions.assertion: A failed payment produces the approved correctable invoice or billing remediation path instead of silently succeeding, double-charging, or blocking without recovery.
negative_assertions.expected_result: Payment failure is represented as a correctable invoice/billing state with evidence; no provider behavior is invented beyond committed contracts.

closure_rule: S2-RI-013 may not close and Stage 2 runtime integration may not close unless all five negative assertions pass or a human-approved blocker explicitly supersedes this demo contract.
